name: Nuclear Deviled Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange each ear of corn on a piece of plastic wrap.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients and stir just to mix.
3. Brush corn well with seasoning mixture.
4. Wrap tightly.
5. Arrange in a triangle pattern, 2 layers deep, in a microwave.
6. Cook on high for 6 minutes.
7. Turn and rearrange corn so that inside of ears are now outside.
8. Cook on high for another 6 minutes.
9. Allow to rest for 5 minutes.
10. Remove from oven, remove and discard plastic wrap.
11. Serve hot.
